arts.ttl: Celtic's move to protect fans' best interests cannot be faulted after Premier Sports opt-out
arts.sum: Following recent developments, Celtic have now declined the Premier Sports TV option, which would have seen the club earn a maximum of £150,000 if two home Scottish Premiership matches were aired via the broadcaster. Celtic’s upcoming Scottish Premiership top-two showdown against Aberdeen looks set not to be broadcast on television next Saturday after the club opted out of Premier Sports’ SPFL contract.

arts.ttl: Sligo Rovers vs Celtic LIVE score and goal updates from friendly clash in Ireland
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers takes his players who are not involved in international duty to the birthplace of Brother Walfrid

arts.ttl: Premiership club CEO explains why he 'genuinely' sees a chance to fight Celtic for future titles
arts.sum: Per The Edinburgh Evening News, McKinley has cited the near completion of an investment deal involving Hearts and Brighton & Hove Albion chairman Tony Bloom as a potential route to challenging Celtic for future Scottish Premiership titles, with a heavy focus on recruitment via analytics. Andrew McKinley on fighting Celtic for Scottish Premiership title

arts.ttl: Kolo Toure reveals Brendan Rodgers advice to former Celtic coach as he stays ready after false start in the dugout
arts.sum: Toure was given his first coaching job by Rodgers but remains out of work after disastrous short Wigan spell

arts.ttl: The noise about Luis Palma's Celtic situation can be answered with a straightforward response
arts.sum: The Honduras international has been on the periphery for the Bhoys this season despite scoring ten times and laying on ten assists last term. Luis Palma’s Celtic situation has gained attention over the last few weeks as he finds himself with work to do to force his way back into Brendan Rodgers’ plans.

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd hopes Celtic END Aberdeen's winning run as Rangers loyalties shine through
arts.sum: Kris Boyd hopes Aberdeen's winning run ENDS at Celtic Park - so Rangers can catch up with the leading pack. When you look at Aberdeen, under Peter Leven last year, there was a good end to the season, they finished strong and were able to come back with a smile on their face with a new manager.

arts.ttl: Where Celtic rank in global transfer top 100 as EPL quirk fails to mask where the money is
arts.sum: The CIES Football Observatory has also ranked each club's most valuable player baed on a 'fair price' index

arts.ttl: John Hartson questions 'clumsy' Celtic star's Premier League credentials despite 'asset' praise
arts.sum: “Whether or not he could make that step up to the Premier League level, I don’t think he’s technically great in terms of taking the ball in and showing that he’s got a wonderful touch and he’s got guile and things like this. John Hartson isn’t convinced “clumsy” Celtic hero Daizen Maeda has the credentials to cut it in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Luke McCowan tells Aberdeen how the Celtic dressing room feels about their visit to Parkhead
arts.sum: Building up to the big game, Celtic midfielder, Luke McCowan has shared how the Hoops dressing room is viewing the big game and is targeting all three points for the current Scottish champions. And for Jimmy Thelin’s Aberdeen, keeping up with the Glasgow giants seems to have surprised everyone, especially after Aberdeen’s 3-2 win over Hearts at the weekend,

arts.ttl: John Hartson insists Celtic outcast can revive his Parkhead career despite losing place
arts.sum: John Hartson reckons Luis Palma can still revive his Celtic career - but must seize his opportunity when it comes. Get the latest news sent straight to your messages by joining our Celtic WhatsApp community today.
